nodes.name: Configuration
nodes.notes: Set key parameters for the workflow. By default the browser is visible (headless=false) for debugging, can be set to true for production.

nodes.name: Get Foreclosures Needing Property Info
nodes.notes: Retrieves foreclosure records from Airtable that need property information. Uses the filter to find records from the specific auction that have an SBL but no Property data.

nodes.name: Initialize Browser
nodes.notes: Initializes a Puppeteer browser instance. Headless mode is controlled by the Configuration node, with visibility enabled by default.

nodes.name: Prepare Processing Context
nodes.notes: Combines the browser instance with the records to be processed into a single context object that will be used throughout the workflow.

nodes.name: More Records to Process?
nodes.notes: Checks if there are more records to process based on the counters.

nodes.name: Get Next Record
nodes.notes: Retrieves the next record to process from the array while maintaining the overall context.

nodes.name: Extract Property Info
nodes.notes: Uses Puppeteer to navigate the Ulster County property database, search by SBL number, and extract property information.

nodes.name: Update Foreclosure Record
nodes.notes: Updates the foreclosure record in Airtable with the property information extracted from the website.

nodes.name: Update Processing Context
nodes.notes: Updates the processing context by incrementing the counter and adding the current result to the results array.

nodes.name: Close Browser
nodes.notes: Properly closes the browser instance when all records have been processed.

nodes.name: Return Processing Results
nodes.notes: Returns the final processing results including statistics and processed records.
